posts.title: Alex Swoyer has written a powerful Book, “Lawless Lawfare: Tipping the Scales of Justice to Get Trump and Destroy MAGA.” The unprecedented Weaponization of “Justice” by the Democrats against their Political Opponent (ME!) can never be forgotten, or allowed to happen again. Read this Book, and remember what the Radical Left Democrats are capable of, and what we overcame through sheer Grit, Wisdom, and Courage. Get your copy today:
posts.text:
Alex Swoyer has written a powerful Book, “Lawless Lawfare: Tipping the Scales of Justice to Get Trump and Destroy MAGA.” The unprecedented Weaponization of “Justice” by the Democrats against their Political Opponent (ME!) can never be forgotten, or allowed to happen again. Read this Book, and remember what the Radical Left Democrats are capable of, and what we overcame through sheer Grit, Wisdom, and Courage.
 
Get your copy today:
https://www.amazon.com/Lawless-Lawfare-Tipping-Justice-Destroy/dp/B0FCYKGK7L
